stories.headline: Oceanfront festival returns with 40 local vendors this weekend
stories.brief: The Virginia Beach oceanfront festival is back Saturday with 40 local vendors, live music on two stages, and free entry before noon.
body: Organizers confirmed the festival runs Saturday and Sunday from 10am to 9pm along the boardwalk between 17th and 24th Street.
Forty local vendors were selected this year, up from twenty-six in 2025, with priority given to Hampton Roads small businesses.

stories.headline: Summer Game Fest 2026 drops 16 new PS5 titles
stories.brief: Sixteen new PlayStation 5 titles were announced at Summer Game Fest 2026, with three studios confirming Hampton Roads-based development teams.
